# HowAutomate
> B2B agency for Data engineering, AI implementation, and business automation.
## Core Pages
- [Services](https://howautomate.com/services): AI, data, and automation services
- [Blog](https://howautomate.com/blog): Guides on ETL, AI agents, CRM automation, cloud
## Key Articles
- [What is ETL](https://howautomate.com/blog/what-is-etl)
- [AI Receptionist Guide](https://howautomate.com/blog/ai-receptionist-guide)
- [Azure vs AWS](https://howautomate.com/blog/azure-vs-aws)
